content: Laravel 12 middleware configuration uses bootstrap/app.php withMiddleware() callback. Aliases are registered via ->alias(['name' => Class::class]). The 'can' middleware is already pre-registered as Illuminate\Auth\Middleware\Authorize. In bootstrap/app.php, the current TenantSmith already has aliases for 'module', 'role', 'permission'. Adding a 'central-admin' alias is the clean pattern. Alternatively, Gate::define() in AppServiceProvider boot() + 'can:central-admin' middleware on route groups. The FormRequest authorize() method can call Gate::allows('central-admin') directly.
